Petitioner United Brotherhood Of Carpenters And Joiners Of America Local Union No. 22 Petition To Compel Arbitration (Transferred From Dept. 301)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Feb-03-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner United Brotherhood Of Carpenters And Joiners Of America Local Union No. 22 Petition To Compel Arbitration (Transferred From Dept. 301). Appearances: Stewart Weinberg, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld (510) 337-1001, appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Jill J. Figg, Esq. Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3971 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Hearing held and argued. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules that the matter is continued for hearing to February 3, 2010 in Department 301. (Petitioner challenge to Judge Woolard, pursuant to CCP section 170.6 - accepted) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
